name: Apricot Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together thoroughly in a large bowl using your hands: 10 cups rolled oats, 1 tsp salt, 1 tsp vanilla, 1/4 cup honey, and 1 10-oz jar apricot jam.
2. Spread the mixture out on a large cookie sheet.
3. Bake at 350°F for about half an hour until it starts to brown. Stir the granola every five minutes or so to ensure even baking.
